creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
Always glad to hear my work is welcomed!

Still I always feel rather confused, being asked for using my official name (not a bit it's a secret). I understand it is not you, but the official guide asks for it.

Some good soul (martymac) had listened to my own stance [0] on me not using that and agreed on it. I may hope the official stance of the FreeBSD as a project may also sometimes change in favor of all the people who prefer to use their real names rather than official ones. At least by using pseudonyms.

For now, I understand you and other commiters being subject to strict rules and have nothing against applying my patches under their own names should they prefer this way, while being thankful for using pseudonyms if they feel appropriate.

Kind regards,
Älven

[0] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=278528#c7
